decks.notes: This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with cheap and efficient creatures and burn spells. By playing aggressively and utilizing cards that provide additional value, such as Burning-Tree Emissary and Goblin Bushwhacker, the deck aims to deal damage quickly and efficiently. The inclusion of cards like Galvanic Blast and Lightning Bolt further supports this aggressive strategy, aiming to finish the game before the opponent has a chance to stabilize. With a focus on speed and efficiency, this deck aims to win the game as quickly as possible.

This deck focuses on leveraging artifacts for maximum efficiency and damage output, utilizing cards that synergize well with each other to overwhelm the opponent with a fast-paced and aggressive playstyle. By combining artifact creatures like Myr Enforcer and Refurbished Familiar with powerful spells like Galvanic Blast and Thoughtcast, the deck aims to quickly build a strong board presence and deal significant damage to the opponent. Utilizing cards like Krark-Clan Shaman and Toxin Analysis, the deck also has the potential to disrupt the opponent's strategy and maintain control of the battlefield.

The main focus of this Dimir Control deck is to disrupt the opponent's game plan through a combination of removal spells, counterspells, and card draw. By efficiently controlling the board and maintaining card advantage, the deck aims to out-value and outlast the opponent until it can confidently deploy its finishers, such as Gurmag Angler and Lórien Revealed. The deck also incorporates graveyard synergies with cards like Thought Scour and Mental Note to further enhance its control strategy. Overall, the deck seeks to control the game tempo and win through incremental advantage.

The main focus of this Dimir Control deck is to disrupt the opponent's plans through a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and graveyard manipulation. By generating card advantage with Thought Scour and Mental Note, the deck aims to control the board with efficient creatures like Gurmag Angler and disruptive spells like Tolarian Terror. The deck also includes a mix of card draw and graveyard hate to combat various strategies, while relying on a solid mana base to support its control game plan.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through counterspells and removal spells while using card draw and graveyard manipulation to outvalue the opponent. The key strategy involves efficiently using cards like Brainstorm, Thought Scour, and Ponder to dig for answers, while utilizing impactful threats like Gurmag Angler and Lórien Revealed to close out the game. The deck also includes a mix of disruption and card advantage spells, along with a mana base that supports the strategy of outlasting the opponent in a longer game.

This Dimir Control deck focuses on maintaining board control and disrupting the opponent's strategy through counterspells, removal spells, and card draw. The deck utilizes powerful creatures such as Gurmag Angler and Lórien Revealed to apply pressure while keeping the opponent in check with cards like Snuff Out and Thought Scour. The inclusion of Abandon Attachments and Unexpected Fangs allows for additional flexibility in dealing with threats. With a mix of control elements and efficient threats, this deck aims to outlast opponents and grind out victories through incremental advantage.

The main focus of this Mono Green Aggro deck is to quickly build up an aggressive board presence with cheap and efficient creatures like Glistener Elf and Blight Mamba, while utilizing pump spells like Might of Old Krosa and Mutagenic Growth to deal a large amount of damage early in the game. The inclusion of cards like Snakeskin Veil and Embiggen provide protection and additional power boost to the creatures, allowing for a swift victory against opponents. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent through fast and relentless attacks, making it a formidable force in Pauper 1 vs 1 matches.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly deal damage to the opponent using aggressive creatures and burn spells. By efficiently using cards like Sneaky Snacker, Guttersnipe, and Kessig Flamebreather, along with spells like Lightning Bolt and Fireblast, the deck aims to apply pressure early on and finish off the opponent with direct damage spells. The synergy between the creatures and burn spells allows for a fast-paced aggressive strategy that aims to overwhelm the opponent before they can stabilize.

This Mono Black Aggro deck focuses on quickly building board presence through low-cost creatures and sacrificing creatures for value. Key cards like Carrion Feeder and Mortician Beetle benefit from sacrificing creatures, while cards like Rotten Reunion and Village Rites provide card advantage. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with fast, aggressive plays and utilize removal spells like Snuff Out and Spinning Darkness to maintain tempo. The deck also includes cards like Thorn of the Black Rose for card advantage and Corrupted Conviction for a pump effect to close out games.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize the Tireless Tribe card in combination with various support cards to enable a powerful combo. Cards like Inside Out and Pursue the Past help to pump up Tireless Tribe's power, while other cards like Faithless Looting and Thrilling Discovery help with card draw and selection. The deck also includes protection spells like Gods Willing and Prismatic Strands to keep Tireless Tribe safe and ensure the combo can go off successfully. The overall goal is to quickly build up Tireless Tribe's power and swing in for a game-winning attack.

The main concept of this deck revolves around utilizing a combination of artifacts, creatures, and spells to create powerful synergies and generate card advantage. Players aim to set up a board state that can quickly overwhelm the opponent through a mix of removal, card draw, and creature buffs. By carefully balancing resources and utilizing cards like Retraction Helix and Banishing Knack, the deck can pull off explosive combos and control the game through tempo. The inclusion of various land and artifact synergies adds depth and versatility to the overall strategy.

This deck focuses on disrupting your opponent's strategies while building your own resources. It utilizes removal spells like Spinning Darkness and Cast Down to control the board, along with creature removal like Defile and Crypt Rats. The deck also includes card draw options like Nihil Spellbomb and Ichor Wellspring to maintain card advantage. Additionally, it features resilient creatures like Troll of Khazad-dûm and Avenging Hunter to pressure the opponent. The land base includes utility lands like Witch's Cottage and Bojuka Bog to further disrupt the opponent's graveyard strategies.

The main focus of this deck is to assemble Urzatron, consisting of Urza's Power Plant, Urza's Tower, and Urza's Mine, which provides a significant amount of mana to cast powerful spells and creatures. The deck utilizes control elements such as Generous Ent and Candy Trail to disrupt the opponent's strategy while ramping into big threats like Maelstrom Colossus and Pinnacle Kill-Ship. With additional card draw and mana fixing from cards like Crop Rotation and Prophetic Prism, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with its powerful creatures and spells.

The deck is focused on quickly overwhelming the opponent with a swarm of goblin creatures and finishing them off with burn spells and direct damage. By using efficient creatures like Mogg War Marshal and Reckless Lackey to flood the board and pump spells like Goblin Bushwhacker to increase their damage output, the deck aims to assemble a lethal combo to secure victory. The inclusion of cards like Goblin Grenade and Fireblast provides additional reach and the ability to close out games even when the opponent stabilizes.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly assemble a combo using cards like Balustrade Spy and Dread Return to mill your entire library and bring back a powerful creature like Lotleth Giant to finish off your opponent in one shot. The deck includes a variety of creatures that help ramp up mana and draw cards to help find your combo pieces quickly. The goal is to overwhelm your opponent with a surprise attack before they have a chance to react.

The main focus of this Mono Blue Aggro deck is to play aggressively by utilizing low-cost spells and creatures to quickly pressure the opponent. By efficiently countering and disrupting the opponent's plays with cards like Force Spike and Counterspell, while also enabling card draw and graveyard synergy with cards like Thought Scour and Cryptic Serpent, the deck aims to maintain tempo and outpace the opponent. With a mix of creatures, spells, and control elements, the deck seeks to overwhelm and defeat the opponent before they can establish their own game plan.
